pathways.name: UK Innovator Founder ILR · 36 months
pathways.meta: Probability of meeting 2 of 7 business criteria by month 36

criteria.text: R&D with IP (WIPO patent on file)
. Three criteria already evidenced. ILR risk: continuity of innovation activity through year three.

pathways.name: US EB-1A · self-petition
pathways.meta: Probability of meeting 3 of 10 extraordinary-ability criteria

criteria.text: . RFE risk: independent expert letters and field-impact evidence.

pathways.name: Singapore GIP · Option A renewal
pathways.meta: Probability of clearing S$10M plus 30 employees with 50% citizens/PRs by year 5

criteria.text: currently 14% versus 50% required. 5-year horizon makes this viable with hiring shift.

pathways.name: UAE Golden Visa · Founder track renewal

criteria.text: . Free zone entity, Emiratisation rubric not currently in scope. Renewal risk: continued operational presence.

takeaway.text: Halcyon Sensor Compute carries a credible

. UAE Golden Visa renewal at 86% is the strongest near-term pathway. UK Innovator Founder ILR at 78% is achievable on the basis of evidence already on file. The Singapore GIP gap is a hiring-mix issue, not a substance issue. EB-1A self-petition is realistic with structured evidence work.
